nasb.text: However, Absalom, whom we anointed over us, has died in battle. Now then, why are you silent about bringing the king back?”

esv.text: But Absalom, whom we anointed over us, is dead in battle. Now therefore why do you say nothing about bringing the king back?”

cnv.text: 我們所膏立統治我們的押沙龍，已經在戰場上死了。現在你們為甚麼不出聲請王回來呢？”

ccb.text: 我们膏立为王的押沙龙已经死了，为什么无人说请王回来呢？”
